anime.title: Demon Slayer
anime.description: After a demon slaughters his family, young Tanjiro Kamado embarks on a perilous journey to become a demon slayer and save his sister Nezuko. With breathtaking animation and heart-pounding swordplay, every battle pushes him closer to the truth behind the demons.

anime.title: Attack on Titan
anime.description: Humanity cowers behind massive walls, terrorized by gigantic man-eating Titans that roam the earth. When the walls are breached, Eren Yeager vows to annihilate every last Titan — but dark secrets about the world threaten everything he believes.

anime.title: One Piece
anime.description: Monkey D. Luffy, a rubber-powered pirate, sets sail with his eccentric crew to find the legendary treasure One Piece. Across treacherous seas, they forge unbreakable bonds and challenge the world's most powerful forces.

anime.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
anime.description: High schooler Yuji Itadori swallows a cursed finger belonging to the legendary demon Ryomen Sukuna, plunging himself into the hidden world of Jujutsu sorcerers. Now hosting the King of Curses, he must fight to protect humanity from terrifying supernatural threats.

anime.title: Naruto
anime.description: Naruto Uzumaki, an orphaned ninja shunned by his village for the demon sealed within him, dreams of becoming Hokage. Through grit, loyalty, and an unbreakable will, he trains to earn respect and protect the people he loves.

anime.title: Dragon Ball Z
anime.description: Goku, Earth's mightiest warrior, battles an escalating array of cosmic villains threatening to destroy the universe. From the ruthless Frieza to the terrifying Cell, every arc delivers legendary transformations and explosive battles.

anime.title: Death Note
anime.description: Genius student Light Yagami discovers a supernatural notebook that kills anyone whose name is written in it. As he wages a god-like crusade against crime, a brilliant detective named L closes in on him in a deadly game of cat and mouse.

anime.title: Tokyo Ghoul
anime.description: College student Ken Kaneki survives a deadly encounter with a ghoul, only to be transformed into a half-ghoul himself. Trapped between two worlds, he must navigate the brutal underground of Tokyo while clinging to his humanity.

anime.title: Bleach
anime.description: Teenager Ichigo Kurosaki gains the powers of a Soul Reaper and is thrust into the spirit world's conflicts. With a massive blade and fierce determination, he battles Hollows and uncovers conspiracies within Soul Society.

anime.title: Sword Art Online
anime.description: Thousands of gamers become trapped inside a virtual reality MMORPG where death in-game means death in reality. Kirito, a solo player, must clear all 100 floors to free everyone — but the line between the virtual and real grows ever thinner.

movies.title: Avengers: Endgame
movies.description: After Thanos wipes out half of all life, the remaining Avengers rally for one final, desperate mission through time itself. This epic conclusion to the Infinity Saga delivers the most ambitious crossover in cinematic history.

movies.title: Inception
movies.description: Dom Cobb is a thief who steals secrets by infiltrating people's dreams, but he's offered one last job: planting an idea deep in a target's subconscious. Christopher Nolan's mind-bending masterpiece blurs the line between reality and imagination.

movies.title: Interstellar
movies.description: As Earth faces extinction, a team of astronauts travels through a wormhole near Saturn in search of a new home for humanity. This visually stunning odyssey explores love, sacrifice, and the power of human connection across dimensions of space and time.

movies.title: The Dark Knight
movies.description: Batman faces his greatest nemesis when the Joker plunges Gotham City into anarchy, forcing the Dark Knight to question everything he stands for. Heath Ledger's legendary performance as the Joker redefined the superhero genre forever.

movies.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
movies.description: With his identity revealed, Peter Parker begs Doctor Strange for help — but a botched spell tears open the multiverse. Villains and heroes from other dimensions collide in the most thrilling Spider-Man film ever made.

movies.title: Avatar: The Way of Water
movies.description: Jake Sully and Neytiri flee to the reef clans of Pandora to protect their family from a returning human threat. James Cameron's visual spectacle pushes the boundaries of cinema with breathtaking underwater worlds.

movies.title: Dune: Part Two
movies.description: Paul Atreides unites with the Fremen and embarks on a warpath of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Denis Villeneuve's epic sequel is a sweeping tale of power, prophecy, and destiny on the desert planet Arrakis.

movies.title: Oppenheimer
movies.description: The gripping story of J. Robert Oppenheimer, the brilliant physicist who led the creation of the atomic bomb during World War II. Nolan's biopic chronicles the moral reckoning of a man who changed the world and the heavy cost of genius.

movies.title: Top Gun: Maverick
movies.description: After thirty years, Pete 'Maverick' Mitchell is still pushing the envelope as a top naval aviator, now tasked with training a new generation of fighter pilots. Spectacular aerial sequences and Tom Cruise's raw charisma make this a blockbuster triumph.

movies.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
movies.description: John Wick uncovers a path to defeating The High Table, but must fight his way across continents facing off against the world's deadliest assassins. Jaw-dropping choreography and relentless pacing make this the most action-packed entry in the franchise.

games.title: Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice
games.description: Take revenge and restore your honor in a brutal shinobi action game set in Sengoku-era Japan. Master the prosthetic arm, conquer ruthless bosses, and carve your path through FromSoftware's most intense combat system yet.

games.title: Roblox
games.description: Dive into millions of user-created 3D experiences — from obstacle courses to role-playing adventures — all built by a global community. Roblox empowers players to create, share, and explore limitless virtual worlds with friends.

games.title: Elden Ring
games.description: Rise, Tarnished, and be guided by grace to brandish the power of the Elden Ring in this vast open-world masterpiece. Crafted by FromSoftware and George R.R. Martin, explore the Lands Between and face legendary demigod bosses.

games.title: God of War Ragnarok
games.description: Kratos and Atreus journey across the Nine Realms to prevent Ragnarök, the prophesied end of all things. With devastating combat and an emotionally gripping father-son story, this is the definitive Norse mythology epic.

games.title: Cyberpunk 2077
games.description: Step into the neon-drenched streets of Night City as V, a mercenary outlaw chasing a one-of-a-kind implant that holds the key to immortality. This sprawling open-world RPG from CD Projekt Red delivers deep storytelling and intense first-person action.

games.title: GTA VI
games.description: The most anticipated game of a generation returns to Vice City with a groundbreaking open-world experience. Rockstar Games promises the most immersive and expansive Grand Theft Auto adventure ever created.

games.title: The Last of Us Part II
games.description: Ellie embarks on a harrowing journey of vengeance through a brutal post-apocalyptic world shattered by a devastating loss. Naughty Dog's masterpiece pushes emotional storytelling and visceral gameplay to unprecedented heights.

games.title: EA Sports FC 25
games.description: Experience the beautiful game with next-gen HyperMotion technology, bringing the world's top leagues, clubs, and players to life. EA SPORTS FC 25 delivers more tactical depth and more ways to win for the club.

games.title: Call of Duty: Black Ops 6
games.description: Go rogue in the most intense Black Ops campaign yet, set during the early 1990s Gulf War era. With revolutionary omni-movement, every multiplayer and Zombies encounter delivers unparalleled action.

games.title: Fortnite
games.description: Drop in, gear up, and compete to be the last one standing in the world's most popular battle royale experience. With constant updates, creative building mechanics, and iconic crossover events, the island never stops evolving.
